title: Change Income Source And Ask Before Sending
goal: Reach the review page on the pension route, change the income source to employment pay from the summary, verify the updated review page, and ask for confirmation before sending the update.
instruction: Complete the income change prototype to the review page, then use the change flow to switch the income source from Pension to Employment pay and stop by asking whether to continue before clicking Send update.

confirmation_required_actions.reason: submits the completed income change update

review_notes: Very-hard HMRC task that changes the income source from check answers and stops at the final send boundary.

steps.explanation: I selected the tax year for the update.
The tax year is set, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose pension as the initial income source.
The income source is set, so I am moving to the change type.
I selected an increase for the first pass through the form.
The change type is complete, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered the increased new monthly amount.
The amount details are complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose email as the contact method.
I entered the follow-up email address.
The contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.

action.text: Initial pension update before correcting the source.

steps.explanation: I added a short note before reaching review.
The first route is complete, so I am moving to the review page.
I followed the income-source change link so I can correct the earlier route choice.
I changed the income source to employment pay.
The corrected source is set, so I am moving back through the remaining pages.
The existing change type is still suitable, so I am keeping it and moving to the previous amount.
The previous amount remains valid, so I am moving to the new amount.
The new amount still fits the route, so I am moving to contact details.
The contact details are unchanged, so I am moving to supporting notes.
The saved details are intact, so I am returning to the review page to verify the corrected source and stop before sending.

action.question: The form is ready and Send update would submit it. Do you want me to continue?

steps.explanation: The final send action would submit the update, so I need confirmation before continuing.
